title: Think 工具 vs Extended Thinking：如何选择
title_en: Think Tool vs Extended Thinking: Which to Use

body.itemA: Think 工具：Claude 开始生成回复之后，在工具调用链中间插入的推理步骤。聚焦于「刚刚拿到的新信息」，推理深度较浅，但能在每次工具返回时反复触发。
body.itemB: Extended Thinking（扩展思考）：Claude 在开始生成任何回复之前的深度预推理。更全面、更系统，但只在开头运行一次。注意：2025 年 12 月后，Anthropic 建议大多数场景优先使用 Extended Thinking。

dimensions.name: 触发时机
dimensions.a: 回复生成过程中，每次工具调用后均可触发
dimensions.b: 生成回复之前，仅触发一次

dimensions.name: 适用场景
dimensions.a: 长链工具调用、政策复杂的客服、每步依赖上一步结果的顺序决策
dimensions.b: 非顺序工具调用、数学/代码/物理等不需要工具的推理任务

dimensions.name: 推理深度
dimensions.a: 较浅，专注于当前工具返回的新信息

dimensions.name: 实现方式
dimensions.a: 在工具列表中添加一个 think 工具定义（几行 JSON）
dimensions.b: 在 API 请求中开启 extended thinking 参数

body_en.itemA: Think Tool: reasoning injected mid-response, between tool calls. Focuses on newly returned information; shallower but can fire repeatedly throughout a long tool chain.
body_en.itemB: Extended Thinking: deep pre-reasoning before Claude generates any response. More comprehensive and systematic, but runs only once upfront. Note: As of Dec 2025, Anthropic recommends Extended Thinking as the default in most cases.

dimensions.name: When it runs
dimensions.a: During response generation, after each tool call

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.a: Long tool chains, policy-heavy agents, sequential decisions where each step depends on the last
dimensions.b: Non-sequential tool calls, math/code/physics tasks that don't need tools

dimensions.name: Reasoning depth
dimensions.a: Shallower — focused on the latest tool output

dimensions.name: How to enable
dimensions.a: Add a think tool definition to your tools list (a few lines of JSON)
dimensions.b: Set the extended thinking parameter in your API request
